topic: debt-runner hybrid expansion — CLI write-side + web dashboard read-side for Technical Debt Management System
revisionReason: post-challenge re-synthesis: 2 verification agents, 4 challenge reviewers, 15 factual corrections applied

otb2_product_strategy.notes: SQLite kept as optional (not fully deferred) because CLI query benefits are real; main constraint is making it non-required for web path

factualCorrectionsApplied: Recharts and shadcn chart NOT installed — must be ADDED
cluster_primary is sparse (2% coverage, 172/8,472) — must be nullable
useTabRefresh scoped to AdminTabId not DevTabId — needs generalization
Static JSON for all fields = 7.6 MB — field stripping to ~2 MB required
Hybrid fetch (dev API + prod static) is now PRIMARY strategy
Pre-generated AI summaries added as Phase 3 build-time capability
Discovery agents reduced from 7 to 3 with resolution-rate gate
4-phase implementation plan added with stop points
Guided mode changed from optional to DEFAULT
MiniSearch added as replacement for Fuse.js
better-sqlite3 Windows compilation risk documented; SQLite made optional
Debt heat map / file tree added as Phase 4 future capability
Diff view between time points added as Phase 4 future capability
Statusline S0 widget added as Phase 1 quick win
themesIdentified: Static export is the load-bearing constraint — but dev mode has an escape hatch
Hybrid fetch strategy eliminates staleness during actual development usage
Field-stripped build-time JSON closes the production gap (~2 MB not 7.6 MB)
Two bugs must be fixed before web development starts (BUG-01, BUG-06)
The table layer determines web usability at 8,472 records
MiniSearch (inverted index) replaces Fuse.js brute-force for client-side search
Start with 3 discovery agents — resolution-rate gate before expanding to 7
Pre-generated AI summaries transform dashboard from numbers to insights
metrics.json as dashboard hub data source; cross-tab synergies deferred until tabs exist
4-phase implementation with independent value at each stop point
architecturalDecision: Hybrid: API route (dev mode, live MASTER_DEBT.jsonl) + static JSON fallback (production, field-stripped to ~2 MB); SQLite optional on Windows
keyConstraint: next.config.mjs output:export eliminates API routes in production; dev mode has full API route support

consumerHints.sqliteStatus: optional — must not be required dependency for web path or build pipeline
consumerHints.rechartStatus: must be ADDED via 'npx shadcn@latest add chart' — not currently installed
consumerHints.discoveryAgentGate: open < 7,000 OR resolution rate > 20% before expanding
consumerHints.phase1Scope: Bug fixes (BUG-01 through BUG-06) + statusline S0 widget
consumerHints.phase2Scope: CLI expansion: guided mode, 3 discovery agents, intake scan, dark debt review
consumerHints.phase3Scope: Minimal web dashboard: hybrid fetch, KPI cards, 1 trend chart, sortable table
consumerHints.phase4Scope: Power features: MiniSearch, filter panel, 5 more charts, diff view, heat map, discovery expansion
preExpansionBugFixes: BUG-01: normalize status strings — debt-health.js line 65 uses lowercase vs uppercase in MASTER_DEBT
BUG-06: expand logMetricsGeneration() to include by_source and by_category (lines 335-356)
BUG-03: add sync-deduped.js call after resolve-bulk.js bulk resolution
BUG-04: add TRIAGED to MASTER_DEBT schema enum
BUG-02: add --dry-run flag to resolve-debt.js and resolve-bulk.js
BUG-05: fix shallow promotion object clone in resolve-debt.js

criticalVerifiedFacts.useTabRefreshScope: AdminTabId only — not applicable to DevTabId without generalization

consumerHints.nuqsDecision: skipped for v1 — use useState instead
consumerHints.aiInsightsCapability: Phase 3 — build-time Claude API call; requires API key; ~$0.01-0.03 per build
futureCapabilities: Debt heat map / file tree sidebar (Phase 4, after GAP-04 fix)
Diff view between time points (Phase 4, simple metric-level first)
WebSocket bridge for one-click dev→CLI handoff (V2)
